findings.title: CanisterSprawl — Self-Propagating npm Supply Chain Worm Steals Developer Tokens
findings.summary: A self-replicating worm spreads through npm by stealing developer publish tokens via postinstall hooks, exfiltrating credentials through ICP canisters for takedown resilience.

findings.title: CVE-2026-40372 — Microsoft ASP.NET Core Emergency Privilege Escalation (CVSS 9.1)
findings.summary: Out-of-band emergency patch for a cryptographic signature verification flaw in ASP.NET Core Data Protection that allows remote attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.

findings.title: Malicious KICS Docker Images — Checkmarx Supply Chain Compromise
findings.summary: Docker Hub KICS repository compromised with modified binaries that exfiltrate scan reports containing credentials from infrastructure-as-code files.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3844 — Breeze WordPress Cache Plugin Unauthenticated RCE (CVSS 9.8)
findings.summary: Unrestricted file upload in the Gravatar caching feature of the Breeze WordPress plugin allows unauthenticated remote code execution when the feature is enabled.

findings.title: BRIDGE:BREAK — 22 Vulnerabilities in Lantronix and Silex Serial-to-IP Converters
findings.summary: Forescout disclosed 22 vulnerabilities in serial-to-IP converters enabling full device hijacking across approximately 20,000 internet-exposed industrial control system bridges.

findings.title: CVE-2025-29635 — D-Link DIR-823X Mirai Botnet Exploitation
findings.summary: Active Mirai-based botnet campaign exploiting a command injection flaw in end-of-life D-Link routers with no patch available.

noted.summary: New ransomware operation using Kyber1024 post-quantum key encapsulation on Windows and ChaCha8/RSA-4096 on ESXi; compromised a US defense contractor.
Four critical flaws (CVSS 9.1-9.9) including PHP code injection and symlink attacks in server management panel.
Unauthenticated RCE (CVSS 10.0) and privilege escalation chain in AI platform with low deployment footprint.
VU#518910: Remote memory leak in Ollama GGUF quantization handling could expose model data or host memory.
Linux backdoor variant using Microsoft Graph API and Outlook C2 targeting South Asian entities in espionage campaign.
Unauthenticated RCE (CVSS 9.8) via .php4 extension bypass in elFinder component; education sector deployment.
Lua sandbox escape enabling filesystem access (CVSS 9.0) in open-source game engine.
Novel data destruction malware targeting Venezuelan energy and utilities sector with systematic file and recovery mechanism destruction.
